chapter_title.en: Chapter on a Man Performing Tawaf on Behalf of Another Man, Whether He is Absent or Present.

text: 2830 - وَ سَأَلَهُ يَحْيَى اَلْأَزْرَقُ : عَنِ اَلرَّجُلِ يَصْلُحُ لَهُ أَنْ يَطُوفَ عَنْ أَقَارِبِهِ فَقَالَ «إِذَا قَضَى مَنَاسِكَ اَلْحَجِّ فَلْيَصْنَعْ مَا شَاءَ ».

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.2830 - It is narrated that Yahya al-Azraq asked Abu Abdullah (as):
"Is it permissible for a person to perform Tawaf on behalf of his relatives?"
Imam (as) replied: "If he has completed the rites of Hajj, then he may do as he wishes."
